name: Discourse
description: Discourse — Open-source forum and community platform with trust levels, plugins, and REST API access.

seo.title: Discourse — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Discourse: Discourse — Open-source forum and community platform with trust levels, plugins, and REST API access.

when_to_use: Self-hosted support forum replacing a Zendesk community
Open-source project knowledge base with trust-level access
Internal engineering Q&A with search-indexed discussions
Customer community with SSO and CRM API integration
Developer forum with plugin extensions and REST API access

pros: Strong SEO and long-form discussion format
cons: Self-hosting Ruby stack is operational work
Default UI dated next to modern SaaS
Hosted plan pricing creeps up fast
review.verdict: The gold standard for SEO-friendly forums, but expect real work to keep it humming.
review.best_for: Open-source projects and brands wanting indexable, long-form community discussions.
review.not_for: Teams needing real-time chat or a zero-ops managed experience.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
